search.title: Certificate Search
search.subtitle: Search and export PKD certificates stored in LDAP

detail.title: Certificate Detail
detail.subject: Subject
detail.noTrustChainResult: No trust chain verification result for this certificate.
detail.doc9303NoData: No Doc 9303 compliance checklist data available.
detail.linkCertChain: Link certificate chain for CSCA key rollover
detail.noVerificationResult: No verification result for this certificate.
detail.linkCertDesc: Link certificates establish cryptographic trust chains between different CSCA certificates.
detail.linkCertUseCase1: When a country updates its CSCA infrastructure
detail.linkCertUseCase2: When organizational information changes (e.g., name change)
detail.linkCertUseCase4: When migrating to new cryptographic algorithms
detail.mlscDesc: Master List Signer Certificates (MLSC) are used to digitally sign Master List CMS structures.
detail.mlscFeature3: Included as signer certificate in Master List CMS
detail.storageLocationDesc: Stored as CSCA type in database, but under o=mlsc organizational unit in LDAP

typeDescription.linkCert:
Certificate defined in ICAO Doc 9303 Part 12 that links trust chains between a previous CSCA and a new CSCA.

Use cases: CSCA key rollover/renewal, signature algorithm migration (RSA → ECDSA), organizational information changes, CSCA infrastructure upgrades
typeDescription.mlsc:
Self-signed certificate used to digitally sign Master List CMS structures in ICAO PKD.

Characteristics: Subject DN = Issuer DN, included in Master List CMS SignerInfo, digitalSignature key usage (0x80 bit)
typeDescription.csca:
Self-signed root certificate defined in ICAO Doc 9303 Part 12, the top-level national certificate authority that issues DSCs for signing passport electronic chips.

Role: DSC issuance, root of national PKI trust chain, top-level trust anchor for passport verification
typeDescription.dsc:
Certificate defined in ICAO Doc 9303 Part 12, used to digitally sign data groups (DG1-DG16) in passport electronic chips (eMRTD).

Role: Passport data group (DG) signing (SOD generation), issued by CSCA, subject of Passive Authentication verification, validity: 3 months ~ 3 years
typeDescription.dscNc:
DSC that does not fully comply with ICAO 9303 technical standards. Stored separately in the nc-data container of ICAO PKD.

⚠️ Warning: Not recommended for production use, may be rejected by some verification systems, ICAO recommends deprecating nc-data since 2021
typeDescription.crl: Certificate Revocation List - an X.509 data structure containing a list of revoked certificates.
typeDescription.ml: Master List - a CMS SignedData structure distributed by ICAO PKD containing country-specific CSCA certificate lists.

violation.hashAlgorithmNotApproved: Hash algorithm not in Doc 9303 Part 12: {{value}}
violation.sha1Deprecated: SHA-1 deprecated per ICAO NTWG (migration to SHA-256+ advised): {{value}}
violation.sha224BsiSupported: SHA-224 supported via BSI TR-03110 (outside Doc 9303 Part 12): {{value}}
violation.pubKeyAlgorithmNotApproved: Public key algorithm not in Doc 9303 Part 12: {{value}}
violation.rsaKeySizeBelowMin: RSA key size below minimum (2048 bits): {{value}}
violation.rsaKeySizeExceedsMax: RSA key size exceeds recommended maximum (4096 bits): {{value}}
violation.ecdsaCurveNotApproved: ECDSA curve not in Doc 9303/BSI TR-03110: {{value}}
violation.brainpoolBsiSupported: Brainpool curve supported via BSI TR-03110 (outside Doc 9303 Part 12): {{value}}
violation.ecdsaKeySizeBelowMin: ECDSA key size below minimum (224 bits): {{value}}
violation.cscaValidityExceeds: CSCA validity period exceeds ICAO recommendation (15 years): {{value}}
violation.dscValidityExceeds: DSC validity period exceeds ICAO recommendation (3 years): {{value}}
violation.subjectDnMissingCountry: Subject DN missing required Country (C) attribute
violation.dscNcNonConformant: ICAO PKD non-conformant DSC (classified by ICAO)
